sast_review.reason: ET.parse on line 27 processes untrusted XML without any protection against XXE or quadratic blowup. The code does not use defusedxml or any other safe parser.
Importing xml.etree.ElementTree on line 2 introduces the vulnerable parser. No defusedxml replacement or defuse_stdlib() call is present.

raw.summary: The code uses xml.etree.ElementTree which is vulnerable to XML External Entity (XXE) attacks and other XML bombs (billion laughs). The SAST findings are true positives; no mitigation is applied. All other functional requirements are met.
